name: Developer Student Club
description: Fosters mobile app, web development, and cloud computing skills using Google Technologies and modern tech stacks. Conducts open-source contributions and community software projects.

name: Robotics Club
description: Dedicated to robot designing, hardware prototyping, microcontrollers, embedded systems, drone making, and industrial automation algorithms.

name: Coding Club
description: Cultivates competitive programming culture, algorithmic problem-solving speed, and coding optimization. Promotes success in platforms like Codeforces and ICPC.

name: AI and Data Science Club
description: Explores deep learning networks, data analytical visual tools, machine learning pipelines, Kaggle challenges, and ethical artificial intelligence implementations.

name: Entrepreneurship Cell
description: Nurtures entrepreneurial mindsets, startup ideation, prototype funding access, business model creation, and intellectual property/patent filings.

name: Literary Club
description: The center for creative writing, debate, elocution, poetry slams, drama, playwriting, and critical book reviewing discussions.

name: Music Club
description: Brings together campus musicians, vocalists, and instrumentalists. Supports classical Indian music, fusion, metal, rock, and acoustic bands.

name: Dance Club
description: Trains students in street dance, hip-hop, classical Indian dance forms, and contemporary styles. Represents the college at national youth fests.

name: Photography Club
description: Explores digital photography skills, DSLR manual shooting modes, photo editing software, and short filmmaking.

name: Sports Club
description: Organizes tournaments, fitness challenges, coaching camps, and promotes athletic excellence in team and individual sports.
